𝗬𝗝_𝗡𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗕𝗬𝗚𝗟𝗔𝗦𝗦𝗘𝗦 | To alert users about the presence of nearby smart glasses, acting as a privacy and self-defense tool.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To alert users about the presence of nearby smart glasses, acting as a privacy and self-defense tool.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Detects nearby smart glasses via Bluetooth LE advertising
✅ Warns users of potential smart glasses presence
✅ Privacy-focused: no data collection or telemetry
✅ Free and open-source
✅ Local log file storage (optional)


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 77 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 9 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Android application detects nearby smart glasses by analyzing their Bluetooth advertising data. It aims to provide users with a privacy-focused warning system, alerting them if potentially surveillance-capable smart glasses are in their vicinity. The app emphasizes user privacy by not collecting or transmitting any personal data.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses

𝗘𝗗𝗜𝗧-𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗡𝗔 | Transforming non-editable visual diagrams from images into editable formats for easy modification and reuse.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Transforming non-editable visual diagrams from images into editable formats for easy modification and reuse.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Converts static images of diagrams into editable DrawIO (XML) format
✅ High-fidelity reconstruction preserving original details and logical relationships
✅ Powered by SAM 3 and multimodal large models
✅ Online demo available for immediate use
✅ Supports various diagram types including flowcharts and architecture diagrams


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 329 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 10 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Edit Banana is a framework that converts static visual formats, such as figures and diagrams from images, into fully editable formats like DrawIO (XML). It leverages advanced AI models, including SAM 3 and multimodal large models, to reconstruct diagrams with high fidelity, preserving original details and logical relationships.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/BIT-DataLab/Edit-Banana

𝗗𝗘𝗩𝗜𝗖𝗘-𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗜𝗧𝗬-𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥 | Security research and demonstration of privacy vulnerabilities in instant messaging applications like WhatsApp and Signal by analyzing device activity patterns through RTT measurements.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Security research and demonstration of privacy vulnerabilities in instant messaging applications like WhatsApp and Signal by analyzing device activity patterns through RTT measurements.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Detects device activity (active, standby, offline) based on RTT of delivery receipts.
✅ Infers potential location changes by differentiating between mobile data and WiFi.
✅ Provides a web interface for real-time monitoring and activity pattern visualization.
✅ Offers a CLI interface for direct interaction.
✅ Utilizes Node.js, TypeScript, and React for its implementation.
✅ Includes Docker support for easy deployment.


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 676 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 19 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This project demonstrates a proof-of-concept for tracking device activity on WhatsApp and Signal by analyzing the Round-Trip Time (RTT) of message delivery receipts. It can infer whether a device is active, in standby, or offline, and potentially detect location changes.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/gommzystudio/device-activity-tracker

𝗗𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗢𝗪 | Improving the accuracy and reducing the sensationalism of YouTube video titles and thumbnails through community contributions and configurable display options.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Improving the accuracy and reducing the sensationalism of YouTube video titles and thumbnails through community contributions and configurable display options.
📅 Created: Oct 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Crowdsourced titles and thumbnails for YouTube videos
✅ Replaces original titles with user-submitted or formatted text
✅ Replaces original thumbnails with user-submitted screenshots or random timestamps
✅ Configurable fallback options for titles and thumbnails
✅ Option to view original titles and thumbnails
✅ Browser extension available for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 71 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 129 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

DeArrow is a browser extension that aims to combat sensationalism on YouTube by allowing users to crowdsource and submit better titles and thumbnails. It replaces original YouTube titles and thumbnails with user-submitted alternatives or applies configurable formatting and random screenshots when no submissions are available.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ajayyy/DeArrow

𝗛𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗣𝗔𝗚𝗘-𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗘 | To provide a centralized, easy-to-manage dashboard for homelab services, bookmarks, and system monitoring.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 CSS 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a centralized, easy-to-manage dashboard for homelab services, bookmarks, and system monitoring.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Service Monitoring with real-time status checks
✅ Bookmark Management organized by groups
✅ System Metrics (CPU, Memory, Disk) with real-time updates
✅ Modern UI with multiple themes and custom backgrounds
✅ Lightweight design with a single binary and low memory footprint


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 218 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 6 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Homepage-lite is a lightweight, Go-powered dashboard for managing and monitoring homelab services and bookmarks. It offers real-time status checks, system metrics, and a customizable modern UI with multiple themes.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆
